text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
262 
PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_2M 
LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Coinsurance Standard Mail Order — Two-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a two-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of 
the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS
